series_metadata.series_description: Files contain Articles of Incorporation and Code of Regulations, statutory examination report, and other financial information and correspondence relating to a particular credit union.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for six (6) years following liquidation, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for six (6) years following liquidation, then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
